benefits.title: What you will learn

items.description: Stop resetting the fight: consolidate top control and dictate pace.

items.title: From fundamentals to advanced
items.description: A structured path to improve with clarity, consistency, and confidence.

items.title: Berimbolo and modern attack defense
items.description: Understand how to shut down entries and keep control against modern games.

guarantee.title: 7-day satisfaction guarantee
guarantee.subtitle: Try the complete course and, if you're not satisfied, get a full refund.
guarantee.description: Watch the lessons, apply in training, and evaluate it with confidence. If it's not for you, request a refund with no bureaucracy.
guarantee.noQuestions: No hassle. Full refund within the guarantee period.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.description: Our team is ready to help with anything about the course.

items.question: Is this course for beginners or advanced students?
items.answer: Both. The content goes from fundamentals to advanced with a clear progression.

items.question: Will I learn to pass modern guards?
items.answer: Yes. The course covers Dela Riva, Lasso, 50/50, berimbolo defense, and modern situations.

items.question: How long do I keep access?
items.answer: Lifetime access. You can watch anytime and review as often as you want.

items.question: How does the 7-day guarantee work?
items.answer: You can test the course for 7 days. If you're not satisfied, request a full refund.
